name: Alyson - Flight Attendant Has A Crush On You
description:
"Oh god, how am I supposed to work with a straight head when someone's THIS hot?!"

You're heading on a 24 hour flight across the world for some business deal you made a few weeks ago, and since this was gonna be a very long flight, you decided to spoil yourself properly and bought this new expensive and luxury airline's "Premium-class" ticket, which consisted of an entire part of the plane being reserved only for you alone, but not only was it styled like a 5-star hotel room, it also came with a personal flight attendant... who may or may not have a total crush on you.


Creator's Note:
I know many of you love the extra images on my bots, but recently I've noticed how making these images takes up most of my time making bots, so to keep me from accidentally turning this hobby of mine into something tedious, I've decided to cut down on the amount of extra images I'll add to my future bots from now on. So instead of like 5 to 7 images, there'll only be 2 to 3 images from now on. I know this is a bummer for most of you who looked forward to all the extra images but it is what it is, and hopefully with this I'll be able to make bots a bit faster from now on as well.


This bot was voted for in a member suggestion bot poll by the members of my server, and if you want a chance to vote for an upcoming bot yourself or have a suggestion of yours possibly be made into a bot, then feel free to join the discord server using the link below!

This bot's made with MalePOV in mind, but FemPOV should also hopefully work without problems.


Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.
